name: Keeper Secrets Manager (KSM)
description: Installs the Keeper Secrets Manager CLI (ksm) and forwards KSM_CONFIG from the local host environment into the container.

version.description: Select the version of KSM CLI to install. Use 'latest' for the most recent version.

config.description: KSM_CONFIG value to forward into the container. Defaults to the local KSM_CONFIG environment variable.

secrets.description: JSON object mapping environment variable names to Keeper secret references. Format: {ENV_VAR_NAME: keeper/uid/field}. Example: {JASYPT_ENCRYPTOR_PASSWORD: keeper/K9mZx8yW7vU6tS5rQ4pO3n/password}
